text:
This subtitle does not prevent an owner of private property that is a private road from:

(1) regulating or prohibiting use of the property by the public for vehicular travel; or

(2) requiring conditions different from or in addition to those specified by this subtitle.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 542. Gen. Provisions
##### § 542.005 — Rules on Private Property

This subtitle does not prevent an owner of private property that is a private road from:

    (1) regulating or prohibiting use of the property by the public for vehicular travel; or

    (2) requiring conditions different from or in addition to those specified by this subtitle.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This subtitle does not prevent an owner of private property that is a private road from:
regulating or prohibiting use of the property by the public for vehicular travel; or
requiring conditions different from or in addition to those specified by this subtitle.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
